articles.description: The gaming company behind the smash hit PUBG Series will launch an “assault” into the NFT battlegrounds. The world’s leading video game publishers are experimenting with Web3 gaming, utilizing NFT assets and cryptocurrency-based ecosystems in the process. A well-known gaming company with a tremendously successful brand is developing blockchain-based games — specifically, on Solana. Krafton,...
